get.description: List WhatsApp message templates for the business with optional filters and pagination.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by translation status (draft, pending, approved, rejected, paused).

schema.description: Filter by translation status (draft, pending, approved, rejected, paused).

post.description:
Create a new template. Send either a full payload with translations (name, category, translations[])
or a flat payload (name, category, language, text, header_text, footer_text, buttons, phone_number_id).

Sample variables (for Meta approval): When body, header, or URL button text contains placeholders like {{1}}, {{2}},
you must provide sample values so Meta can display a preview. Use body_example (flat payload) or
translations[].example_variables (translations payload): one string per placeholder in order (index 0 = {{1}}, index 1 = {{2}}, etc.).

translations.description: optional When present, full create is used. Each item: language (5-char code), components (header, body, footer, buttons), and example_variables (array of sample strings for {{1}}, {{2}}, etc. in order; required when any component has placeholders).

phone_number_id.description: optional Phone number to attach (for translations payload).

language.description: when not using translations. Language code.

text.description: when not using translations. Body text; use {{1}}, {{2}} for variables.

body_example.description: when text contains {{1}}, {{2}}, etc. Sample values in order (one per placeholder); sent to Meta as BODY example for approval.

put.description:
Update an existing template. Send either a full payload with translations (name, category, translations[])
or a flat payload (name, category, language, text, header_text, footer_text, buttons, phone_number_id).
Same payload shapes as create for consistency.

Sample variables (for Meta approval): When body, header, or URL button text contains placeholders like {{1}}, {{2}},
you must provide sample values. Use body_example (flat payload) or translations[].example_variables (translations payload).

category.description: optional One of: marketing, utility, authentication.

translations.description: optional When present, full update is used. Same shape as create.

phone_number_id.description: optional Phone number (flat payload). Use template's if omitted.

text.description: when flat payload. Body text; use {{1}}, {{2}} for variables.

body_example.description: when text contains {{1}}, {{2}}, etc. Sample values in order.

delete.description: Delete a template by ID. Use to remove obsolete or unused templates.

parameters.name: template
parameters.description: Optional parameter. uuid required The template ID.

post.description: Sync templates from Meta into your business. Use to refresh the local template list after changes in Meta.

get.summary: List templates for a phone number
get.description: List templates attached to a specific phone number. Each template includes its translations with full components (body, header, footer, buttons, example_variables). Use to show or edit template content for that number.

parameters.name: phoneNumber
parameters.description: Optional parameter. uuid required The phone number ID.

post.description: Copy templates from one phone number to others. Use to replicate template setup across numbers.

target_phone_number_ids.description: Array of target phone number UUIDs.

post.description: Sync templates from one phone number to all others in the group. Use to keep group numbers in sync.

get.description: List all WhatsApp phone numbers for your business. Use to show channel list or pick a number for sending.

post.description: Register a new WhatsApp phone number for the business. Use when adding a channel from Meta.
Sync phone numbers from Meta into your business. Use to refresh the list after adding numbers in Meta.
Verify that a phone number is correctly connected to the WhatsApp Business API. Use for health checks or troubleshooting.

parameters.name: phoneNumber
parameters.description: Optional parameter. uuid required The phone number ID.
